Home → Discography → BTNHResurrection

BTNHResurrection

2000 · Ruthless Records

Platinum

#1 Billboard 200

The fourth studio album by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony, debuting at #2 on the Billboard 200 (#1 R&B) and quickly went Platinum. Notably features Flesh-n-Bone on 14 of 15 tracks, his last appearance before a decade-long prison sentence. Production was handled by DJ U-Neek, L.T. Hutton, Jimmy Thomas and Darren Vegas. A darker, more introspective record that marked the group's return after a three-year gap.

"Move faster and then ask 'em about the state of men and help the matter, Brace yourself, I can't tell if I'm in peril."

— The Righteous Ones
01 Show 'Em produced by Jimmy Thomas ▷
02 The Righteous Ones produced by Darren Vegas feat. David's Daughters ▷
03 2 Glocks produced by Jimmy Thomas ▷
04 Battlezone produced by LT Hutton ▷
05 Ecstasy produced by DJ Uneek ▷
06 Murder One produced by DJ Uneek ▷
07 Souljahs Marching produced by Jimmy Thomas ▷
08 Servin' Tha Fiends produced by Jimmy Thomas ▷
09 Resurrection (Paper, Paper) produced by Jimmy Thomas ▷
10 Can't Give It Up produced by LT Hutton ▷
11 Weed Song produced by DJ Uneek ▷
12 Change the World produced by DJ Uneek feat. Big B ▷
13 Don't Worry produced by DJ Uneek ▷
14 Mind on Our Money produced by DJ Uneek ▷
15 No Way Out produced by Jimmy Thomas ▷
16 One Night Stand produced by Darren Vegas ▷
